name: healthcare_water_allocation_model_lumen_car_fair
premise: A trauma activation coincided with a ransomware containment step that disabled imaging imports mid-resuscitation. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare water allocation model lumen car fair has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is care versus fairness under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Priya Santos
agents.identity: I am Priya Santos, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Priya Park
agents.identity: I am Priya Park, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on fairness.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on fairness for immediate traction on care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Priya Santos must choose under care versus fairness. What does Priya Santos do?
